compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement preconditions-baseline-collect.sh restart-rate baseline
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Implement the restart-rate baseline collector script.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Create plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-baseline-collect.sh
- [ ] Accepts args: epic_id, session_id (required); worktree_id (optional, defaults to current branch)
- [ ] Reads REPLAN_TRIGGER comment count from ticket history to derive restart_count
- [ ] Calls _write_preconditions with gate_name=restart_rate_baseline and data including restart_count and timestamp
- [ ] chmod +x applied
- [ ] All tests in tests/scripts/test-preconditions-baseline.sh pass GREEN

## Files to Modify
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-baseline-collect.sh

## Testing Mode
GREEN — makes T3 tests pass

## Depends On
T3 (bdfa-7b54), T4 (2018-40a6)
